---
title: "Railroad Children, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Scenes and Characters,” &c."
---

## Railroad Children, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Scenes and Characters,” &c.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1855
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London; Masters and Co., 78, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
